calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Christopher Peters, Esq. 888-922-2367 Fullman Firm, moving party
Ivan Shomer, Esq. specially appearing for the attorney/Moving party.
No other Appearance.

The Court passes the matter and instructs Mr. Shomer to contact the attorney of record who filed the motion on Zoom since the court's tentative ruling is hearing required. The matter will be taken off calendar if counsel of record fails to appear.

9:40 The matter is recalled.
Hearing is held. No appearance by Diana Factor. The Court adminishes counsel and poses questions to Mr. Peters re more facts, breakdown in communication, service in El Salvador, Mr. Peters informs the court of events post judgment. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DIANA FACTOR's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Before the court is an unopposed Motion to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel Christopher Peters, Adam C. Fullman, Sam Dehbozorgi and The Fullman Firm, P.C., counsel of record for Defendant Diana Joy Factor.

Prior to the hearing, Moving Parties shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a completed proposed order on MC-053 that includes accurate information regarding next court date and, if any, trial date.

The motion is Granted. Order is signed in Open Court.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
